title: Create items in other boards by date via automation
excerpt: Need to be able to create an automation that uses date as an exception. For example “When an item is created and only if the date is before this date and after this date then create an item in this board.” We schedule a …

posts.author: ttovar (Thomas)
posts.cookedHtml: Need to be able to create an automation that uses date as an exception. For example “When an item is created and only if the date is before this date and after this date then create an item in this board.” We schedule a lot of events and right now our clients fill out a form and we have to organize them into the correct months, but an automation would make that much simpler.
